title: APAC Artificial Thistle Purple Spray | Pack of 2 | Thistle Bud Artificial Faux Silk Flower with 3 Heads | Artificial Flower for Vase Display, Home, Wedding, Restaurant, Photography Decorations
description: Purple artificial thistle with 3 buds on the stem. Height 66cm (26in), The buds are a beautiful purple with green faux silk leaves. This charming teasel is a favourite for wild flower lovers perfect for a happy sunny display on a window sill or kitchen table. Eryngium is a genus of flowering plants in the family Apiaceous. Eryngiums are also known as sea holly. The thistle is also connected to positive symbolism. These artificial sea holly flowers are made of high-quality plastic leaf fabric, flower pole, iron wire injection moulding structure and not easy to deform. These luscious purple thistle buds are elegant and realistic, perfect for a wild rustic look in a vase. These are widely used for wedding corsages, button holes and bouquets. Artificial Eryngium flower high-quality plastic made Realistic effects length 66cm Easy to clean Perfect for any occasions
